claims.text: All 19 IOPD patients in the study (identified through Taiwan's nationwide newborn screening program) received early ERT at a mean age of 11.05 days (range 6–23 days), and the overall hearing impairment rate was 31.6% (6/19) at last follow-up.

citations.quote: All the patients received their first ERT within 4 h of admission at a mean age of 11.05 days (range 6–23 days).
the HI rate was 31.6% (6/19)
